project.name: bq-schema
project.summary: Python library to define BigQuery schemas as dataclasses and run migrations
project.description: bq-schema lets you define BigQuery table schemas as Python dataclasses, run migrations to create/update tables, and serialize/deserialize rows. It ensures schema and code stay in sync before deploy and supports versioning. Includes a convert-table script to bootstrap schemas from existing tables; requires Python 3.7+.
